title: FAIL: Berggren triple with C²+F²≠G² (non-Pythagorean direction)
_fixture_purpose: FAIL fixture: declares a Berggren tree move with a non-Pythagorean triple. The triple (7,11,13) does NOT satisfy C²+F²=G² (49+121=170≠169). This means the direction is NOT on the Pythagorean cone and cannot serve as a valid gnomonic navigation step.

moves.name: WRONG: not a Berggren move
moves._note: WRONG: C should be 2*3*2=12, F should be 9-4=5, G should be 9+4=13. Declared (7,11,13) violates C²+F²=G².

fail_ledger.reason: Triple (7,11,13) is not Pythagorean: 49+121=170≠169. Navigation on non-Pythagorean directions is not gnomonic-valid.
